title: oligoneuron corymbosum
intro: Oligoneuron corymbosum, also known as American ironweed, is a perennial plant native to North America, characterized by its tall, upright stem and clusters of small, purple flowers. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones. Consuming American ironweed is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating symptoms of colds and flu, as well as exhibiting potential antioxidant and antimicrobial effects. American ironweed can be prepared as a tea or infused in oil, or used in tincture form, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies.
